zh.lifeSummary: 當Christina Halyburton於大約1416年出生在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安迪萊頓時，她的父親Walter Halyburton 1st Lord Haliburton of Dirleton11414歲，母親Mary Douglas of Douglas, relic of Rothesay43歲。她於1440年與George Leslie 1st Earl of Rothes在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1508年在蘇格蘭班福爾洛斯享年93歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christina Halyburton于大约1416年出生在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安迪萊頓时，她的父亲Walter Halyburton 1st Lord Haliburton of Dirleton11414岁，母亲Mary Douglas of Douglas, relic of Rothesay43岁。她于1440年与George Leslie 1st Earl of Rothes在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1508年在苏格兰班福爾洛斯享年93岁。

nameMeanings.name: Christina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified form of Latin Christiana, feminine form of Christianus ( see Christian ), or a Latinized form of Middle English Christin ‘Christian’ (Old English christen, from Latin).

en.lifeSummary: When Christina Halyburton was born about 1416, in Dirleton, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Walter Halyburton 1st Lord Haliburton of Dirleton, was 11414 and her mother, Mary Douglas of Douglas, relic of Rothesay, was 43. She married George Leslie 1st Earl of Rothes in 1440, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1508, in Rothes, Banffshire, Scotland, at the age of 93.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christina Halyburton est née environ 1416, à Dirleton, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter Halyburton 1st Lord Haliburton of Dirleton, avait 11414 ans et sa mère, Mary Douglas of Douglas, relic of Rothesay, avait 43 ans. Elle a épousé George Leslie 1st Earl of Rothes en 1440, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1508, à Rothes, Banffshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 93 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christina Halyburton um 1416 in Dirleton, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter Halyburton 1st Lord Haliburton of Dirleton 11414 und ihre Mutter Mary Douglas of Douglas, relic of Rothesay 43. Sie hat 1440 in Scotland George Leslie 1st Earl of Rothes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1508 im Alter von 93 Jahren in Rothes, Banffshire, Scotland.

Lei sposato George Leslie 1st Earl of Rothes nel 1440, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1508, nel Rothes, Banffshire, Scotland, all'età di 93 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Christina Halyburtonが約1416年にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンディルレトンで生まれた時，父Walter Halyburton 1st Lord Haliburton of Dirletonは11414歳，母Mary Douglas of Douglas, relic of Rothesayは43歳であった。1440年にスコットランドでGeorge Leslie 1st Earl of Rothesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1508年にスコットランドバンフシュアイアロススで93歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christina Halyburton(이)가 대략 1416년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 디를레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Halyburton 1st Lord Haliburton of Dirleton(은)는 11414세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Douglas of Douglas, relic of Rothesay(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 1440년 스컷랜드에서 George Leslie 1st Earl of Rothes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1508년 스컷랜드 반프실르 로트스에서 93세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christina Halyburton nasceu aproximadamente 1416, em Dirleton, East Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Walter Halyburton 1st Lord Haliburton of Dirleton, tinha 11414 anos e sua mãe, Mary Douglas of Douglas, relic of Rothesay, tinha 43 anos. Ela casou-se com George Leslie 1st Earl of Rothes em 1440, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1508, em Rothes, Banffshire, Scotland, com 93 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christina Halyburton родилась около 1416 г. в местности дирлетон, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Walter Halyburton 1st Lord Haliburton of Dirleton было 11414 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Douglas of Douglas, relic of Rothesay, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени George Leslie 1st Earl of Rothes в 1440 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1508 г. в местности ротесь, банффшир, Шотландия в возрасте 93 лет.
